feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: MRP Wizard MSN5 table No Data
entry.content:
Hi All,

While creating Document through MRP wizard in Sap B1, Created documents(Purchase Order,Purchase Request) details are not listed in MSN5 table. Please let me know any configuration need to update if data need to save in that particular table.

entry.title: Auto-insert AR-Invoice data to linked server SQL table on manual or DI API entry Using SQL Triggers
entry.content:
Requirement: To insert newly created AR invoice data into a SQL table, either manually or via the DI API.
Solution Tried: Insert statement via PostTransactionNotification 
Test Result of PostTransactionNotification : Worked only with manual AR Invoice posting but failed with invoices posted via DI API.
Test Result of SQL Trigger: This works fine for the following requirement
Can we use SQL trigger on the OINV table to insert the data in a SQL table. If I move forward with this trigger,
What are the possible risks or issues associated with it?
NOTE: This must not be implemented using the DI API’s ActionSuccess handler.

entry.title: Web Client Extension Error 404 - React App with React Router
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm trying to add tile extension to SAP B1 WebClient written in React.JS and it worked unless I added React Router functionality to it.

Now main page displays an error of 404. It is the problem with the address of a page, but I can't find a solution how to solve that. I added the 'homepage' tag as '.' to package.json like docs says but it didn't help.

If anyone knows the answer, please let me know. Thanks.

entry.title: SAP Business One Inventory Aging Report Document Price Logic
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can you enlighten me how does the Inventory Aging Report gets the Amount if you selected the Document Price.

Base on SAP Help Portal https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE/68a2e87fb29941b5bf959a184d9c6727/d5848e3985ba4130a115c6c3dfc4a22d.html

  • Document Price – The price per receipt document is used.

But when generating the report, it is not.

 

Regards,
Lean

entry.title: How to get a negative value in selection criteria of query report?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to get a negative value in the selection criteria of a query report?

Please see the sample below:

DECLARE @dayfrom AS INT
DECLARE @dayto AS INT
Select @dayfrom = T0.NumOfDays FROM CDC1 T0 Where T0.NumOfDays = '[%0]' Select @dayfrom = '[%0]'
Select @dayto = T0.NumOfDays FROM CDC1 T0 Where T0.NumOfDays = '[%1]' Select @dayto = '[%1]'

While executing this, we can add a negative sign and the report would should data as per selection criteria.

Ex. -10 & -20

Is it possible to make changes in the report so that the user enters a positive value but the query checks it for negative value, ex: in selection criteria user enters 10 and 20 but the result should display it based on  -10 and -20?

Regards,

Joseph

entry.title: Cannot change Posting Date approved grpo draft
entry.content:
Dear Experts 

First, I used SAP Business One 10 PL 2011 on HANA DB

Second, I create Draft GRPO, and after that, when I try to change Posting Date, I find it not Editable like Due Date and Document Date (Attached)

But in another DB, I find Posting Date is Editable and can change it 

Can Anyone Support me in this case 

 

Regards

Kamal

entry.title: AUTO ADD CASH AMOUNT IN PAYMENT MEAN SAP BUSINESS ONE
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I wanna add cash amount automatically in payment mean's cash tab while adding A/R Invoice + Payment document and dont want to see payment mean window after click on add document button. Can it be possible via Transaction Notification or formatted search that we can insert the document total amount in payment mean's cash total column?

Thanks & Kind Regards

Sohail Ahmed

entry.title: How to separate the string for a query column custom name into two lines?
entry.content:
Hello,

I have this working simple example query in SAP Business One, which calls for all entries for a parameter (document number from all Sales Order documents) to be displayed in a column, which is then renamed:

SELECT T0."DocNum" AS "Document Number" FROM ORDR T0

Which displays a standard table with all the document numbers separated in rows for Sales Orders in a single column named "Document Number". 

My question is: how do I split the custom header string "Document Number" into two lines, so it reads

"Document

Number"

as the column name in the query result?

entry.title: Sales Order Line-Level MRP Recommendations - SAPB1
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have received a requirement from our client regarding the MRP order recommendation process. The client would like MRP recommendations—specifically Purchase Requests (PR) or Purchase Orders (PO) to reflect child part requirements on a per-sales-order-line basis, rather than consolidating demand across multiple sales order lines.

Example Scenario:

In a sales order (SO123) with two line items for the same parent material, where the BOM contains a common child item:

Current behavior: MRP consolidates the total child part requirement (e.g., 30 units for RM1001) and generates a single PR or PO.

Client requirement: MRP should generate two separate recommendations (e.g., 20 units for RM1001/SO123/Line 001 and 10 units for RM1001/SO123/Line 002), maintaining clear traceability to each sales order line.

Thanks!!!

entry.title: Contact person does not update correct based on LINENUM
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to update BP contact person via DTW. I want to make contact persons INACTIVE. I use contact employees template. In that template LINENUM field have to fill up. so sometime it update correct Contact persons. sometimes it does not update correct persons. if I add 0,1 in LINENUM. so it update first and second contact persons. But when I add 1,2,6 like this. so it does not update second, third and fifth contact persons. sometimes it update forth person instead of 6.

Can you please guide me how to make contact persons INACTIVE via DTW?

entry.title: Copy Table from query manager does not copy all the rows
entry.content:
SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.191) FP 2202 (64-bit)

Why are not all rows copied when we use the "Copy Table" function and paste into Excel?

entry.title: [SAP Business One] SAP Auto download all *.LRF Files when connect DI
entry.content:
Dear all,

My client have an issue on AddOns functions: When open AddOns form, SAP auto down load all .LRF files into OBServer/GUI folder on Client. It takes 130 MB.

My question: How can we disable auto download .LRF file/Or only set download 1 LRF file (instead of all files)

Appreciate your help
BEONE Vietnam

entry.title: invalid path for report file
entry.content:
Hello together,

we have a problem with sending PDFs files through Outlook. The first 2-3 times it works, but after we get an error "invalid path for report file". I know this happens when something happens to the file in the %temp% folder. But any idea why this happens so irregular? And why it happens the first times and just happend to stop working.

Kind regards,

Bastian Neuhoff

entry.title: How can I get the EDoc Generation Type field in the OINV
entry.content:
Hi,

I have some invoices that by mistake the EDoc Generation Type field is "Not Relevant" and others that have "Generate". I need to run a query just with invoice number and the EDoc Generation type field but I cannot find the field in the OINV. With the mouse over the field I can see that the table could be ECM6 but this table is empty.

 

Any idea?

entry.title: Wrong password for new company database
entry.content:
Hi SAP B1 Experts,

I facing an issue with a newly created company DB. I'm unable to access the company since the system throws an error message "Incorrect password". Whatever password I enter, the system still reject it. I have checked all SAP services, B1Site user status and password are OK. I'm using SAP B1 v10 FP 2308.

Please can someone could give an idea on how to solve this issue?

Thanks for your support

Muledi

entry.title: SAP B1 UI Templates
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

Is it possible to add any new tabs in the starndard (default) report provided by SAP by using "Edit Form UI"?

Our clients in UK used "BAS report generation", They asked me to add the following information to check each information smoother during BAS report generation process.

  • Description of transactions
  • Business Partner

I used UI API, but I could not add new tab.

 

 

 

 

 

Our B1 version is as follows:

  • SAP Business One 10.0  SP 2408

Best regards,

entry.title: BUDGET QUERY
entry.content:
Good afternoon, esteemed experts. I am looking to create a query for the Budget section that compares the actual budget and the amount when a purchase order is generated. The idea is to validate whether it falls within a certain range — for example, from 1 to 200, or from 200 to 400 as an excess over the budget. The issue is that the query returns too many results. Do you have any ideas on how to structure it?

  SELECT

  *

  FROM(

  SELECT

  T1.AcctCode,

  T1.OcrCode,

  SUM(T1.LineTotal) Total

  FROM ODRF T0

  INNER JOIN DRF1 T1 ON T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry

  WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del AND T0.ObjType = '22' AND T0.DocType = 'S'

  GROUP BY

  T1.AcctCode,

  T1.OcrCode

  )A

  INNER JOIN (

  SELECT

  T0.AbsId,

  T0.OcrCode,

  T1.AcctCode,

  T2.DebLTotal

  FROM OBGS T0

  INNER JOIN OBGT T1 ON T1.Instance = T0.AbsId

  INNER JOIN BGT1 T2 ON T2.BudgId = T1.AbsId AND T2.Line_ID = (MONTH(@FechaPRESUPUESTO)-1)

  WHERE YEAR(T0.FinancYear) = YEAR(@FechaPRESUPUESTO)

  )B ON B.AcctCode = A.AcctCode AND B.OcrCode = A.OcrCode

  INNER JOIN(

  SELECT

  Account,

  ProfitCode,

  SUM(Debit-Credit) Used

  FROM JDT1 T0

  WHERE (YEAR(T0.RefDate) = YEAR(@FechaPRESUPUESTO)) AND (MONTH(T0.RefDate) = MONTH(@FechaPRESUPUESTO))

  GROUP BY

  Account,

  ProfitCode

  )C ON C.Account = A.AcctCode AND C.ProfitCode = A.OcrCode

  WHERE (A.Total + ISNULL(C.Used,'0')) > B.DebLTotal

)

BEGIN

  SET @CuentaOC = (

  SELECT

  TOP 1 CAST(D.AcctName AS VARCHAR(20)) + ' - ' + CAST(A.OcrCode AS VARCHAR(10))

  FROM(

  SELECT

  T1.AcctCode,

  T1.OcrCode,

  SUM(T1.LineTotal) Total

  FROM ODRF T0

  INNER JOIN DRF1 T1 ON T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry

  WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del AND T0.ObjType = '22' AND T0.DocType = 'S'

  GROUP BY

  T1.AcctCode,

  T1.OcrCode

  )A

  INNER JOIN (

  SELECT

  T0.AbsId,

  T0.OcrCode,

  T1.AcctCode,

  T2.DebLTotal

  FROM OBGS T0

  INNER JOIN OBGT T1 ON T1.Instance = T0.AbsId

  INNER JOIN BGT1 T2 ON T2.BudgId = T1.AbsId AND T2.Line_ID = (MONTH(@FechaPRESUPUESTO)-1)

  WHERE YEAR(T0.FinancYear) = YEAR(@FechaPRESUPUESTO)

  )B ON B.AcctCode = A.AcctCode AND B.OcrCode = A.OcrCode

  INNER JOIN(

  SELECT

  Account,

  ProfitCode,

  SUM(Debit-Credit) Used

  FROM JDT1 T0

  WHERE (YEAR(T0.RefDate) = YEAR(@FechaPRESUPUESTO)) AND (MONTH(T0.RefDate) = MONTH(@FechaPRESUPUESTO))

  GROUP BY

  Account,

  ProfitCode

  )C ON C.Account = A.AcctCode AND C.ProfitCode = A.OcrCode

  INNER JOIN OACT D ON D.AcctCode = A.AcctCode

  WHERE (A.Total + ISNULL(C.Used,'0')) > B.DebLTotal

  )

entry.title: (APIs) TransportationCode -1 not acquired
entry.content:
Hi guys, here again to ask your GURU help.

When I try to PATCH the value -1 for "TransportationCode" (no transport) via SL, the document takes casual values from OSHP table, but not -1.

I tried patching only the document head TransportationCode, but nothing to do, so I tried to patch even the lines combined with the head (as you can see by code below, tried also via PostMan) but results doesn't change: casual values existing in OSHP, also different between head and lines.

{
  "DocEntry": 263,
  "TransportationCode": -1,
  "DocumentLines": [
           {
            "LineNum": 0,
           "ShippingMethod": -1
          }
 ]
}

Instead, if I patch with zero (nonsense, because not in the OSHP...) it is accepted and acquired. 

Does anyone know where I'm wrong?

Thank you.

entry.title: Subledger Source Document Type in Journal Entry Query
entry.content:
Hi All

How to get a corresponding mapping between these two Origin values in Journal Entry Query Statement and Subledger Journal Entry so we know which Origin Number in JE belongs to AP Invoice PU Origin?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Report for Attachment path
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to create a report which would show us if the link is broken?

Ex. if there is a picture attached to an item and if the the link is broken, we get an error message "file not found". 

I would like to know if there is a way to find out items where the attachment link is broken?

Regards,

Joseph
